name: Apricot-Cardamom Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a medium bowl, stir together flour, brown sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and cardamom; set aside. In a small bowl, stir together apricot nectar, applesauce, oil, and egg until combined. Add to dry ingredients, stirring just until combined. Stir in apricots. Spread batter in an ungreased 11 x 7 x 1 1/2-inch baking dish. Bake for about 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean. Cool in pan on a wire rack. Drizzle with Apricot Icing. Cut into bars.
For Apricot Icing, in a small bowl, stir together powdered sugar and enough apricot nectar to make a glaze.
